# PERF-133 positive: sort.Slice in a loop
lang: go
file: PERF-133-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "sort"

func TopK(buckets [][]int, k int) [][]int {
	for i := range buckets {
		// Closure + reflect per call.
		sort.Slice(buckets[i], func(a, b int) bool {
			return buckets[i][a] > buckets[i][b]
		})
		if len(buckets[i]) > k {
			buckets[i] = buckets[i][:k]
		}
	}
	return buckets
}
